project_type: AWS CDK Java application - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven with mise for Java version management. Must run `mise trust` first, then `mise exec -- mvn <command>`. Maven needs proxy config at ~/.m2/settings.xml (already configured).
test_framework: JUnit 5 (version 5.7.1) with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack, Match.objectLike). Tests are in src/test/java/com/myorg/. The Surefire plugin clears NODE_OPTIONS env var to avoid Jsii issues.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `mise exec -- mvn compile` and confirm BUILD SUCCESS. 2. Run `mise exec -- mvn test` and confirm all tests pass (note: LambdaFunctionTest has 4 pre-existing failures that need fixing). 3. Check for deprecation warnings in compile output.
setup_instructions: 1. `mise trust` in project root. 2. Ensure ~/.m2/settings.xml has proxy config for BigWeaverExecEnvMgnt-ProxyLB-4d485583b9a55f82.elb.us-east-1.amazonaws.com:3128. 3. `mise exec -- mvn compile` to download dependencies.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - Maven Central accessible via proxy. No CDK CLI available for `cdk synth` (NODE_OPTIONS conflicts). Use CDK assertions (Template.fromStack) for validation instead. Java 17 via mise.
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests first, then implement. Conventional commits. Keep ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram in sync. Every CDK construct needs a test. ARCHITECTURE.md is the source of truth.
key_patterns: CDK stack in CdkBaseStack.java uses L2 constructs (Bucket, Table, Topic, StateMachine) and CallAwsService for DynamoDB/Polly direct SDK integration. Tests use Template.fromStack() with Match.objectLike() for assertions. Test files are per-feature (CdkBaseTest, DynamoDbMetadataTest, StepFunctionsTest, LambdaFunctionTest, SnsNotificationTest). State machine uses Chain pattern with Catch blocks routing to failure path.
directory_structure: Standard Maven layout. src/main/java/com/myorg/ has CdkBaseApp.java (entry) and CdkBaseStack.java (all infrastructure). src/test/java/com/myorg/ has test files. src/main/resources/lambda/audio-processor/ has the Python Lambda code. ARCHITECTURE.md at root.
